title: Grana Stew
description: A hearty stew originating from Ethiopia, made with tender beef and flavorful spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high.
Brown the meat in batches, then set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and cook the onion until softened.
Add garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the rejuvenating herbs, tomato paste, and beef broth.
Return the browned meat to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 1.5 hours or until the meat is tender.
Stir in the grana parmesan and serve hot.
